center.name: 维提岛
center.summary: 维提岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Pacific robin、斐济鹦雀、黑脸鹦雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: kleinschmidti, Viti Levu, Fiji | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Petroica | species = pusilla | authority = Peale, 1849 | range_map = | range_map_caption = | synonyms = Petroica multicolor }} The Pacific robin (Petroica pusilla), is a red-breasted Australasian robin in the passerine bird genus Petroica found in Melanesia and Polynesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Fiji parrotfinch is endemic to Fiji, where it is found on the four largest islands (Viti Levu, Vanua Levu, Taveuni and Kadavu) and also in the smaller western islands of the Mamanuca and the Yasawa groups. It is uncommon but widespread, found in both forested and open habitats, from sea level to at least 1,200 m (3,900 ft) on Viti Levu

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pink-billed parrotfinch is endemic to Fiji, thought to be only found in the wetter central and eastern parts of the largest island, Viti Levu but has also been observed on the Yasawa Islands to the north-west in 2012
